name: project_tree
description: List the file structure of a project root with optional depth and pattern filtering.

name: search_hybrid
description: Perform a hybrid search combining lexical (BM25) and semantic (vector) retrieval.

name: memory_store
description: Store a new memory fragment with automatic semantic deduplication.

name: kg_query
description: Query the temporal knowledge graph for entities, triples, or timelines.

name: find_definition
description: Locate the definition of a symbol across the workspace using AST analysis.

name: agent_prime
description: Provide the agent with initial context and project-specific instructions.

name: recall_memories
description: Retrieve memories relevant to the current task context using semantic similarity.

name: kg_add_triple
description: Add a subject-predicate-object triple to the knowledge graph.

name: ast_chunk_file
description: Parse a source file into semantic chunks based on its Abstract Syntax Tree.

name: workspace_index_status
description: Get the current status of the workspace indexing process.

name: semantic_rerank
description: Rerank a list of search results using a cross-encoder model for higher precision.

name: memory_audit
description: Run an audit on the memory store to identify inconsistent or stale entries.
